title: SQL Analysis and Reporting
subtitle: Use SQL to calculate values, summarize rows, and build beginner reports.
learningGoals: Create calculated columns with arithmetic expressions.
Use aliases to make result columns readable.
Use beginner string, number, and date functions safely.
Use COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX.
Explain the difference between COUNT(*) and COUNT(column).
Build small KPI and reporting queries.
